toolsIndex.title: Free Online Media Tools
toolsIndex.subtitle: Focused, single-purpose tools for converting, compressing, transcribing, and cleaning up image, video, and audio files. No signup. Files deleted within 24 hours.

needMore.title: Need more than a single-purpose tool?
needMore.body: The homepage converter bundles every option — format, AI tools, metadata, trim, transcription — into one upload. Tutorials walk through every setting.

learnMore.title: Learn more
learnMore.intro: Guides and reference pages that pair with these tools.

howItWorks.label: How Media Manipulator works
howItWorks.description: See how files are processed and temporarily stored.

toolPage.notFoundBody: We could not find the tool you were looking for. Browse all available tools below.
